steps.title: Spot the degree signal
steps.content: The word more directly modifies deep, showing that deep expresses a greater degree or intensity of seclusion.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
Choice D, intense, conveys a heightened degree, matching the sense of more deep seclusion.
Choices A, B, and C describe qualities (tough, hideous, complicated) that do not convey degree.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
